qa_pair.question: A shopper needs the least expensive in-stock variable-speed unit for a compact bedroom whose supported area ends at 13 square metres. Search candidates, inspect the matching product, and return only its SKU.

For a 12 square metre bedroom with a 10,000,000 VND ceiling that values low noise and lower electricity use, request the ranked shortlist and validate its first candidate against its detail. Return only the first-ranked SKU.
Using the same 12 square metre, 10,000,000 VND quiet-and-efficient shortlist, compare all returned choices. Which SKU is the cheapest? Return only the SKU.
Explore the bedroom-capable catalog entries, inspect the lowest-noise candidates, and identify the unit with the smallest published noise number. Return only its SKU.
For the two 1.5 HP inverter models intended for roughly 15-22 square metres from the Japanese brands in the catalog, compare their published noise values. Return only the quieter SKU.
Use the policy knowledge base to infer the nominal cooling capacity recommended for a 25-35 square metre room. Return only the BTU value in the source's dotted Vietnamese-number format.
Find the policy entry that explains zero-percent card financing and check its identifier. Return only the FAQ identifier.
Compare the available 2 HP inverter choices for a larger living room and find the lowest-priced one. Return only its SKU.
Search catalog promotions and inspect the high-capacity candidate that includes a no-cost pre-installation survey. Return only its SKU.
Use the delivery-and-installation policy entry to determine the stated city delivery window for Hanoi and Ho Chi Minh City. Return only the duration exactly as written.
